scripts.build: npx terser js/script.js --compress --mangle -o js/script.js && npx cleancss -o css/style.css css/style.css && npx html-minifier-terser index.html --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --remove-redundant-attributes --remove-script-type-attributes --use-short-doctype --minify-css true -o index.html
